title: 把生硬回复改自然
theme: 从 pls wait / pls check it / OK no problem 开始
goals: 把生硬、太短的 WhatsApp 回复改成礼貌商务表达
掌握 check / confirm / update / arrange 的基础用法
能在客户催你时，用一句完整英文稳住客户

review.title: 课程起点
items: 你当前高频使用 OK、No problem、pls wait、pls check it。
这些表达能被理解，但经常不够礼貌、不够完整，也缺少下一步动作。
今天先练“稍等、检查、确认、安排”四类基础销售回复。

preview.scenario: 客户要求你检查报价、确认图片、等待工厂回复。
needToKnow: 客户说 Please check 时，不只是让你看一下，通常期待你给出结果。
客户催促时，不要只说 wait，要告诉客户你会查什么、什么时候更新。
OK no problem 后面最好加一个动作，例如 I will arrange it.

vocabulary.usage: 用于普通确认，适合 Let me check.
vocabulary.example: Let me check it and get back to you soon.

vocabulary.usage: 比 check 更正式，表示需要最终确认。
常用于承诺稍后回复客户。
用于安排生产、发货、样品、付款资料。
vocabulary.example: Sure, I will arrange it accordingly.
Please give me a moment to check.

vocabulary.usage: 说明你需要和工厂核实。
vocabulary.example: I will check with our factory.

vocabulary.usage: 商务回复中表示会按客户确认内容执行。

vocabulary.example: Please let me know if you have any questions.

sentences.label: 稍等
sentences.natural: Please give me a moment to check.
sentences.business: Please give me a moment to check with our factory, and I will update you today.

sentences.label: 检查文件
sentences.natural: Please check it when you have time.
sentences.business: Please check the PI and let me know if you have any questions.

sentences.label: 没问题
sentences.business: Sure, I will arrange it accordingly.

sentences.label: 我确认一下
sentences.natural: Let me check it and get back to you soon.
sentences.business: Let me check with our factory and get back to you as soon as possible.

sentences.label: 确认数量
sentences.natural: How many pieces do you need?
sentences.business: Could you please confirm the quantity you need?

chatAnalysis.problem: 太短，像命令客户等待，没有说明你要做什么。
chatAnalysis.better: Please give me a moment to check.
chatAnalysis.upgrade: Please give me a moment to check with our factory, and I will update you today.

chatAnalysis.problem: pls 太随意，it 不够明确。
chatAnalysis.better: Please check it when you have time.
chatAnalysis.upgrade: Please check the PI and let me know if you have any questions.

chatAnalysis.problem: 可以用，但重复太多，而且没有下一步动作。
chatAnalysis.upgrade: Sure, I will arrange it accordingly.

dialogues.title: 慢速基础版：客户让你检查 PI

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please check the PI.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Sure. Please give me a moment to check.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can you update me today?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Yes. I will check it and update you today.

dialogues.title: 正常商务版：客户催确认

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can you confirm the quantity and price?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Sure. Please give me a moment to check with our factory.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: We need to confirm it today.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: I understand. I will update you today as soon as I confirm it.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Why is it taking so long?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: I understand your concern. Let me check the current status first.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please hurry. We need an answer.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: I will push the factory and get back to you as soon as possible.

longDialogues.title: 长对话实战：客户催确认 PI、数量和发货安排

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Hi, please check the PI again.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Sure. Please give me a moment to check it carefully.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: We need to confirm it today.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: I understand. I will check the details and update you today.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please confirm the quantity and price first.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Could you please confirm the final quantity you need?

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: We need 5,000 pieces for the first order.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Thank you. Let me check the unit price with our factory.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Why do you need to check again?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Because the price depends on the quantity and finish.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: The finish is matte black.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Got it. I will confirm the matte black finish with our factory.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can you also check the logo position?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Yes. Please send me the latest logo file for reference.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: I already sent it yesterday.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Thank you. I will check the file again and confirm it with our designer.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please hurry. We cannot wait too long.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: I understand this is urgent. I will push the factory and update you as soon as possible.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: When can you send the revised PI?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: I will send the revised PI to you today after I confirm the details.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please make sure there are no mistakes.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Sure. I will check the quantity, price, finish, and logo position carefully.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: If everything is correct, we will arrange payment.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Thank you. Once you confirm the PI, I will arrange the next steps accordingly.

exercises.prompt: 中译英：请稍等，我确认一下。
exercises.answer: Please give me a moment to check.
acceptable: please give me a moment to check
please give me a moment to check it

exercises.prompt: 把这句话改得更自然：pls wait
exercises.answer: Please give me a moment to check.
acceptable: please give me a moment to check
please give me a moment to check it
exercises.hint: moment 比 wait 更礼貌。

exercises.prompt: 填空：I will check with our factory and ____ you today.
exercises.hint: 意思是“更新你 / 告诉你进展”。

exercises.prompt: 哪个表达更适合发给客户？
options: Please give me a moment to check.
exercises.answer: Please give me a moment to check.
acceptable: please give me a moment to check
exercises.hint: 选完整、礼貌、有动作的句子。

exercises.prompt: 中译英：我会和工厂确认，并今天给你更新。
exercises.answer: I will check with our factory and update you today.
acceptable: i will check with our factory and update you today
i will confirm with our factory and update you today

exercises.prompt: 客户说：Please check the PI. 你应该怎么回复？
exercises.answer: Sure. I will check the PI and let you know if there are any questions.
acceptable: sure i will check the pi
please give me a moment to check the pi
exercises.hint: 回复要包含 check the PI。

homework: 把今天 5 个核心句子各读 5 遍。
把 pls wait / pls check it / OK no problem 分别改写成更商务的句子。
把三个 TTS 对话和长对话各听 2 遍，然后跟读 1 遍。
tomorrow: Day 2 会继续练 check / confirm，并加入客户问数量和颜色的场景。
